questions.subject: IOQM
questions.q: Determine the sum of all possible surface areas of a cube two of whose vertices are $(1,2,0)$ and $(3,3,2)$.
questions.solution:
$Case-I$:
$\begin{aligned} \text { SA } & =6 \times[\sqrt{4+1+4}]^2 \\ & =54 \text { sq.unit }{ }^2 \\ \text { Case-II: } & \end{aligned}$
$2 a^2+9$ $a=\frac{3}{\sqrt{2}} \quad S A=6\left(\frac{9}{2}\right)=27$ sq unit $Case-III$:
$\begin{aligned} & \sqrt{3} a=3 \\ & \Rightarrow a=\sqrt{3} \\ & S A=6 a^2=6 \times 3=18 \text { sq.unit }{ }^2 \\ & \therefore \text { Possible } S A=18+27+54=99\end{aligned}$
